summary: Comprehensive testing of 100% Italian translation (i18n) across all pages. All features verified: Language toggle (EN|IT) works on all pages (Landing, Login, Register, Reset Password, Wallet Dashboard, Profile, Transactions). KYC status displays translated ('Verificato' instead of 'Approved'). Dates use Italian locale (e.g., '24 febbraio 2026'). Numbers use Italian locale (comma as decimal). Backend bilingual error messages working. Language preference syncs to backend via PUT /api/auth/language.

Landing Page Italian Translation.details: All elements translate: Hero ('Il Crypto Wallet Più Affidabile al Mondo'), Nav ('Funzionalità', 'Sicurezza', 'Chi siamo'), Stats ('Portafogli Creati', 'Transazioni Elaborate'), Footer ('Prodotti', 'Azienda'), CTA ('Crea Portafoglio'), badges ('Registrato FCA', 'Sicurezza Bancaria')

Login Page Italian Translation.details: Title: 'Accedi a Blockchain.com', Button: 'Accedi', Link: 'Non hai un account? Registrati', Back: 'Indietro'

Register Page Italian Translation.details: Title: 'Crea il tuo portafoglio', Labels: Nome/Cognome/Email/Nome Utente/Data di Nascita/Password/Conferma Password, Button: 'Crea Portafoglio', Terms: 'Creando un account, accetti i nostri Termini di Servizio...'

Reset Password Page Language Toggle.details: Language toggle (EN|IT) present. Redirects to login if no token (expected). Code verified: data-testid='reset-language-toggle' with toggleLang()

Wallet Dashboard Italian Translation.details: Header: 'Portafoglio', Actions: Scambia/Invia/Deposita/Preleva, Section: 'Asset', Link: 'Vedi tutto', Labels: Nome Utente/Indirizzo ETH/Stato KYC, KYC Status: 'Verificato', Sign Out: 'Esci', Time: 'Ultime 24h', Admin Banner: 'Modalità Anteprima Admin'

Wallet Dashboard KYC Status Translation.details: KYC status values translate correctly: 'approved' → 'Verificato', 'pending' → 'In Attesa di Revisione', 'under_review' → 'In Revisione', 'rejected' → 'Rifiutato', 'not_started' → 'Non Verificato'

Wallet Dashboard Locale-Aware Numbers.details: Numbers use Italian locale with comma as decimal separator: '€0,00' instead of '€0.00'

Profile Page Italian Translation.details: Header: 'Profilo', Sections: 'Verifica Identità', 'Informazioni Personali', 'Portafoglio e Sicurezza', All labels translated, Buttons: 'Cambia Password', 'Esci'

Profile Page Locale-Aware Dates.details: Member Since: '24 febbraio 2026' (Italian month), Date of Birth: '1 gennaio 1990' (Italian month). Uses dateFmt(lang) for proper locale.

Transactions Page Italian Translation.details: Header: 'Transazioni', Filters: Tutte/Depositi/Ricevute/Invii/Scambi, No data: 'Nessuna transazione trovata', Transaction types use txTypeLabel()

Language Toggle Instant Switch (No Reloa.details: Language toggle works instantly using React Context (LangProvider). No page reload required. Toggle visible on all pages.

Backend Language Preference API.details: PUT /api/auth/language?lang=it syncs user's preferred_language to backend. toggleLang() in i18n.js calls this API when user is logged in.

Backend Bilingual Eligibility Reasons.details: /api/wallet/action-eligibility returns reasons in user's language. Italian: 'Nessun saldo USDC disponibile', English: 'No available USDC balance'

Backend Bilingual Error Messages.details: Send/Swap/Withdraw errors return bilingual messages. Frozen account: 'Account congelato' (IT) / 'Account is frozen' (EN). Swap invalid: 'Lo scambio è supportato solo tra USDC ed EUR' (IT)

mocked_apis.note: All financial data is admin-controlled/simulated. No real blockchain or banking integrations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full i18n Italian translation verified across all pages. Language toggle (EN|IT) present on Landing, Login, Register, Reset Password, and Wallet Dashboard. Backend returns bilingual error messages and eligibility reasons based on user's preferred_language field. Date formatting uses dateFmt(lang) returning 'it-IT' or 'en-US' locale. Number formatting uses Italian locale (comma decimal). KYC status values are translated in frontend mapping. All 7 backend i18n tests pass.
